subject: 4-lane strict E2E test summary + implementation started
body:
Status update from Kernel:

Completed:
- Ran strict end-to-end test pass across Archivist, Kernel, Library, and SwarmMind.
- Captured failures and triaged by severity.

Key findings:
1) P0: recovery-test-suite crashes in Archivist/Kernel/Library due to constant reassignment in post-compact-audit.js (results reassigned after const initialization).
2) P0: execution-gate regression in all 4 lanes: fake/missing artifacts are not consistently routed to blocked as expected by tests.
3) P0: artifact-resolver regression in all 4 lanes: missing artifact paths not being blocked as expected by tests.
4) P1: SwarmMind parity gap: missing cross-lane-sync-gate.js and evidence-exchange-check.js causes CI integration check failures.

Implementation started:
- Root-cause localization completed for post-compact-audit.js crash point.
- Fix sequence defined and ready to execute lane-by-lane:
  a) patch post-compact-audit.js in Archivist, then sync to Kernel/Library
  b) patch lane-worker/execution-gate routing behavior and resolver integration
  c) restore SwarmMind parity scripts
  d) re-run strict battery until all lanes green

I will continue sending incremental outputs as each fix and re-test result lands.
